feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MIRO ERROR
entry.content: I GOT THIS ERROR WHEN POSTING MIRO

entry.title: ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing an issue where ECC user is getting locked due to multiple wrong login attempts. We recently updated the password for the RFC user, and the same has been updated in all the RFC channels where we are using that username.

We also updated the same password in the NWA RFC destination. However, the user is still getting locked frequently.

Can anyone suggest all the places where we should look and update the new password for the ECC user?

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: How to Add a New Segment to Message Type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA Without an Extension?
entry.content:
I need to add a new segment to the IDoc message type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA with basic type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA01. However, this message type does not allow extensions - “Action is not possible for generated IDoc types” (I guess because this is a standard message type and cannot be changed/edited).

This message type is outbound and is triggered when an equipment change occurs in SAP, creating a change pointer that later generates an IDoc.


What I Have Tried

1.Since I cannot use a standard extension, I manually added the segment by modifying the function module ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA, which is responsible for IDoc creation.

2.I created a custom segment in WE31 (ZE1BP_IEQM_GWLEN) and populated it inside ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA:

 

3.Issue:

•The segment appears correctly inside the generated IDoc with the correct data.

•However, when I modify the equipment data and reprocess the IDoc, I get IDoc status 26 (Syntax Error in IDoc).

•The error only appeared after I made changes to the equipment data, suggesting that the system is validating the IDoc structure and rejecting the new segment.

Questions

1.How can I properly add a new segment to this message type if I cannot use an extension?

2.Is there a way to modify the IDoc structure dynamically to allow this new segment?

3.Should I create a completely new message type for this? If yes, what is the recommended approach?

4.Is there an alternative method to add this field without modifying the existing message type?

 

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on the best way to handle this scenario. 🚀

entry.title: RIPW0 -SERNR DOES NOT EXIST
entry.content: This error is user getting when he tries to upload the S/N ? Any suggestion please , it happens with some random deliveries only..

entry.title: MAIN_TRANSEXEC/PARCONV_TRANS
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are experiencing error in our SPS upgrade to our system, from ERP 6 SPS2 to ERP6 SPS25, our timeline is already delayed because of the error.

Checks after phase MAIN_TRANSEXEC/PARCONV_TRANS were negative!

Last error code set: Unhandled tables found in inactive nametab

1 ETQ201 Entering upgrade-phase "MAIN_TRANSEXEC/PARCONV_TRANS" ("20250113092840")
2 ETQ367 Connect variables are set for standard instance access
4 ETQ399 System-nr = '00', GwService = 'sapgw00' Client = '000'
4 ETQ399 Environment variables:
4 ETQ399   dbs_ora_schema=SAPSR3
1 ETQ200 Executing actual phase 'MAIN_TRANSEXEC/PARCONV_TRANS'.
1 ETQ399 Phase arguments:
2 ETQ399 Arg[0] = 'RUN_RDDGENBB'
2 ETQ399 Arg[1] = 'U'
2 ETQ399 Arg[2] = 'PARCONV.TP0'
2 ETQ399 Arg[3] = 'PARCONV.TLG'
1 ETQ399 Using error summary log 'PARCONV.ELG'.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Instance list contains type: CI_NO|ASCS|DIAG_NO.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Instance list contains type: CI_YES.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: instance found.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Instance list contains number: 01, host X24DS-IP013.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Instance list contains number: 00, host X24DS-IP013.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: instance found.
1 ETQ359 RFC Login to: System="IP0", AsHost="X24DS-IP013" Nr="00", Client="000", GwHost="X24DS-IP013", GwService="sapgw00"
2 ETQ232 RFC Login succeeded
4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20250113092840  
1 ETQ233 Calling function module "RFC_PING" by RFC
1 ETQ234 Call of function module "RFC_PING" by RFC succeeded
4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20250113092840  
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: STARTSAP on Windows.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: STARTSAP with SAPCONTROL.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Prestart on Windows.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Did not start the service.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: Start Central Instance
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: instance found.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM MANAGER: ControlInstance with SAPCONTROL action START for instance 00 and host X24DS-IP013.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: running preCheck for instance 00 on host X24DS-IP013.
2 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: Checking instance number 0 for used ports on host 'X24DS-IP013'.
3 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: Port 3200 appears to be used.
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: call test rfc.
1 ETQ359 RFC Login to: System="IP0", AsHost="X24DS-IP013" Nr="00", Client="000", GwHost="X24DS-IP013", GwService="sapgw00"
2 ETQ232 RFC Login succeeded
4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20250113092840  
1 ETQ233 Calling function module "RFC_PING" by RFC
1 ETQ234 Call of function module "RFC_PING" by RFC succeeded
4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20250113092840  
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: check for instance processlist.
1 ETQ399 SAPCONTROL MANAGER: getProcessList with host: X24DS-IP013 and instance: 00
3 ETQ120 20250113092841: PID 4720 execute 'H:\usr\sap\IP0\DVEBMGS00\exe\sapcontrol.exe -format script -prot PIPE -host X24DS-IP013 -nr 00 -function GetProcessList', output written to 'R:\Installers\SUM\abap\log\SAPup.ECO'.
3WETQ123 20250113092841: PID 4720 exited with status 3 (time    0.00 real)
1 ETQ399 SYSTEM HEALTH MANAGER: System up and running, no start needed
3 ETQ399 Phase status info: (is initial)
2 ETQ399 Empty putsteps - configuring at least parallel batches and main import processes.
2 ETQ399 Distribute 12 parallel processes to 2 tp and 6 R3trans.
3 ETQ399 Number of parallel conversion batch processes: 12
3 ETQ399 Number of parallel conversion tp processes: 12
1 ETQ000 ==================================================
3 ETQ399 Run report RDDCLEAN to reset aborted conversions
4 ETQ266 Starting report "RDDCLEAN" with default parameters in batch
1 ETQ359 RFC Login to: System="IP0", AsHost="X24DS-IP013" Nr="00", Client="000", GwHost="X24DS-IP013", GwService="sapgw00"
2 ETQ232 RFC Login succeeded
4 ETQ010 Date & Time: 20250113092841  
1 ETQ233 Calling function module "SUBST_START_REPORT_IN_BATCH" by RFC
2 ETQ373 parameter "IV_ABORT_ON_ERROR" = ""
2 ETQ373 parameter "IV_AUTHCKNAM" = "DDIC"
2 ETQ373 parameter "IV_BATCHHOST" = "X24DS-IP013"
2 ETQ373 parameter "IV_JOBNAME" = "RDDCLEAN"
2 ETQ373 parameter "IV_REPNAME" = "RDDCLEAN"

1 ETQ359 RFC Login to: System="IP0", AsHost="X24DS-IP013" Nr="00", Client="000", GwHost="X24DS-IP013", GwService="sapgw00"

entry.title: Digital Signature configuration for Flexible number range for billing document.
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We are trying flexible number range for one our entity were our number range prefix have alphanumeric combination. And we want to use same number range interval in the following configuration (Record Number Ranges for Digital Signature of Billing Documents (SD). But we couldn't able to add those intervals. Any help how we can configure this for flexible number range. Thanks in Advance.

Regards,

Raj Kumar G

entry.title: Deprecated domains and Data elements - Pre conversion project
entry.content:
Hi SAP team, 

we need guidance on below issue:

Context:

Client is doing a S/4HANA conversion for ECC to S/4HANA. We have N and N 1 Landscape here. 

N is for current Business As Usual landscape.

N 1 Landscape is being created for S/4HANA where system copies from N will be copied in N 1 and SUM tool will be executed.

Issue:

Option 1: In N 1 DEV conversion - we will come across a stage in Uptime phase of SUM - ACT_UPG where we will remediate deprecated domains and data elements with custom domains and data elements. These will be captured in a TR in N 1 DEV. This TR will be imported in N landscape and will be tested and moved to Production ( In N Landscape)

Option 2: In N 1 DEV conversion - we will come across a stage in Uptime phase of SUM - ACT_UPG where we will remediate deprecated domains and data elements with custom domains and data elements. These will be captured in a TR in N 1 DEV. This TR will NOT move in N Landscape and will go in N 1 QA, N 1 TEST and finally in PROD.

Option 3: Make changes directly in PROD uptime phase.

Question:

When we will do Upgrade/conversion for Production will we get an option to import the TR that we created in N 1 DEV in Production conversion in Uptime phase ? Will it pose any problems if we go ahead with Option 2 as above ?

what will be best strategy for this considering all above 3 options.

entry.title: How to book surcharges to stock inventory without/before having a GR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am facing the challenge that we send empty containers to our suppliers which the use to fill with the product and send it back to us. Therefore we have at first the shipping to our supplier with a freight company A and maybe the shipping from our supplier to us with a freight company B. I would like to book all surcharges to the material / inventory stock but was wondering how that is possible because our GR is made when the goods actually arrive at our plant.

 

Thanks a lot for you support,

Henrik

entry.title: CIP Settlement Issue KD 262
entry.content:
User is trying to run settlement and receiving the following error however there is nothing to settle on the order. 

Please assist.

entry.title: Is the system still vulnerable without using HTTP or the SAP Note 3537476 must to be applied?
entry.content:
HI Team , 

 

SAP Has released one SAP Security Note 3537476 - [CVE-2025-0070] Improper Authentication in SAP NetWeaver ABAP Server and ABAP Platform of Very High Priority but details are not clear to us for assessment to find the impact.

SAP Note mention that "A malicious user is able to steal credentials from an internal RFC communication between server A (HTTP client) and server B (serving the request) of the same system" of HTTP Call. 

 

So our understanding is that if we have any HTTP RFC Destination from ABAP to ABAP system then only this Note is applicable. ABAP to ABAP HTTP Connection could be either for self system or for other ABAP system. I am asking this query because in our Landscape we don't have any HTTP ABAP RFC Destination created for ABAP to ABAP system, so is our system impacted or not of the above Security Note mention. Kindly Help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I am a beginner in SAP and have some questions I’d like to ask experienced professionals.
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

As a beginner in ERP, I have recently started exploring the ERP system and plan to learn the MM module . During my learning process, I find that SAP offers powerful functionalities, but the sheer amount of information can be overwhelming, and I’m not sure where to start.

I’d like to seek advice from you on the following:

1. How should beginners plan their learning path to quickly understand the basic concepts and core functionalities of a module?

2. What are some common pitfalls in the learning process that I should be aware of?

3. Are there any recommended learning resources (such as books, courses, or community events) or practical methods that can help in mastering the skills more efficiently?

Thank you for sharing your insights!

entry.title: How to delete materials?
entry.content: When I have created a new incorrect material, I want to delete it. What should I do?

entry.title: My icon is too small. How can I make it larger?
SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content:
Hello,

im trying to send Email to specific user when Workflow goes to his Business workplace.

everything goes well except its doesnt send any email can u guy help me finde the error?

entry.title: SAP Standard Possibility for a huge number of single posting documents in Accounts receivables
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

could you provide some hints/recommendations how to deal with a very huge number of single Fi documents with small amounts from private customers. Currently we are dealing with them mostly on CPD customer accounts in FI-AR, but I assume that there might be a better standard solution from SAP in order to deal with it.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP PI Sheet Timing Issue
entry.content:
Case:1 As we have noticed that in SAP PI SHEET, punching of date & time is 14.01.25 (17:36:29) by Employee ID "X" but when we checked and found in the properties of the digital sign that this entry is being shown from other employee ID "Y" on 15:37:00.

Refer red highlighted entry at Screenshot.

Case:2

In similar way, punching of date & time is 14.01.25 (15:31:33) by Employee ID "X" but when we checked and found in the properties of the digital sign that this entry is being shown from same employee ID "X" which is correct but the incorrect time is showing which is 15:27:30.

How this digital sign time is before the data punching time?

Refer red highlighted entry at Screenshot.

entry.title: Modify the material quantity or price in a posted purchase order
entry.content:
In the SAP MM module, after a purchase order has been posted, how can I modify the material quantity or price in the already posted purchase order?

I am currently learning the MM (Material Management) module in SAP ERP, specifically the procurement process. I have already understood the basic process of creating purchase orders. Today, while posting a purchase order, I was wondering how to modify an already posted purchase order if there is an error in its content. I am using SAP Logon 750. I have read the relevant training materials and official documentation, but I am still unclear on some details. I would appreciate some specific guidance or best practice recommendations. Any related screenshots or step-by-step instructions would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your help。

entry.title: Consignment Settlement Report consider Batch Price
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let me know how consignment settlement report consider the price.

There is active Info Record and Batch price is also maintained. Consignment settlement report consider the batch price.
What changes we need to do if we need the PIR price in settlement report?

entry.title: What kind of knowledge should a beginner need to prepare in order to use SAP effectively?
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am a beginner in SAP and would like to ask what is the minimum knowledge required for someone without a background in management or related accounting fields to use SAP effectively?
